memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Hopton, Hobton, Hoptone and others. First found in Shropshire where they were seated from very early times and were granted lands by Duke William of Normandy, their liege Lord, for their distinguished assistance at the Battle of Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: Charles Hopton who settled in the Barbados in 1687; another Charles Hopton settled in North Carolina in 1701; George Hopton settled in Maryland in 1679. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hopton於1388年出生在英國史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素時，他的父親Thomas de Hopton I26歲，母親Joanne de Mortimer25歲。他於1425年與Eleanor Lucy在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hopton, such as those in Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk, from Old English hop ‘remote enclosed place’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hopton was born in 1388, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, his father, Thomas de Hopton I, was 26 and his mother, Joanne de Mortimer, was 25. He married Eleanor Lucy in 1425, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1445, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hoptonが1388年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホープトン カストルで生まれた時，父Thomas de Hopton Iは26歳，母Joanne de Mortimerは25歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホープトン カストルでEleanor Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホープトン カストルで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hopton(이)가 1388년 영국 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Hopton I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne de Mortimer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 Eleanor Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hopton родился в 1388 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Hopton I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne de Mortimer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Lucy в 1425 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
